items.title: Premium recovery release
items.description: Release of premium disruption recovery improvements covering disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation, trip companion & proactive notifications, operational control tower, and customer care & case management across the Guest Mobile App, Proactive Messaging Layer, Network Control Workspace, and Disruption Servicing Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve self-service disruption recovery rate through clearer digital rebooking and communication flows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve repeat guest rate by protecting guest trust during disruption.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve recovery decision cycle time through a better linked operations and servicing workflow.

businessKPIs.kpi: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve irregular operations cost per disrupted flight by reducing manual handling and unnecessary fallout.

productBricks.change: Released richer guest recovery choice flows and eligibility logic.
Released more proactive trip alerts tied to recovery actions.
Released guest-impact views in the operations control workflow.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed disruption recovery updates in the Guest Mobile App.
Deployed guest-impact prioritization in the Network Control Workspace.

items.title: Holiday booking confidence release
items.description: Release of holidays retail and servicing improvements covering holidays packaging & fulfilment, payments, refunds & revenue settlement, identity, profile & document readiness, and trip companion & proactive notifications across Holidays Search and Booking Experience and Holiday Servicing Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve holiday quote-to-book conversion through clearer package and payment journeys.
Improve documentation completion rate through a simpler readiness workflow for group bookings.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve holiday attachment revenue by increasing package completion.

productBricks.change: Released clearer package comparison and fulfilment-state visibility.
Released staged-payment and package-refund workflow improvements.
Released improved family traveller-detail and document-readiness flows.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed package and readiness updates in Holidays Search and Booking Experience.
Deployed servicing workflow updates in Holiday Servicing Workspace.

items.title: Corporate continuity release
items.description: Release of corporate content control and partner continuity improvements covering corporate, agency & NDC distribution, partner & alliance journey orchestration, offer, pricing & availability management, and operational data, revenue & personalisation platform across NDC and Agency API and Commercial Account Workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve in-policy booking rate through better negotiated-content control.
Improve traveller disruption resolution time on partner-heavy itineraries.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve corporate revenue share of wallet by making the airline easier to buy and trust.

productBricks.change: Released account-aware content controls and channel governance improvements.
Released stronger partner continuity context for mixed-carrier itineraries.
Released account-health reporting for sales and programme teams.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed content-control updates in the NDC and Agency API.
Deployed account-health reporting in the Commercial Account Workspace.

items.title: Cargo visibility release
items.description: Release of cargo digital visibility improvements covering cargo capacity, quote & booking, cargo tracking & exception management, and customer care & case management across Cargo Digital Portal and Cargo Connectivity API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve digital cargo booking share through broader self-service booking coverage.
Improve shipment milestone visibility coverage through richer milestone and alerting support.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve cargo yield per available tonne by winning more high-value, digitally manageable shipments.

productBricks.change: Released premium-product-aware quoting and booking improvements.
Released milestone visibility and cargo exception alerting improvements.
Released cargo-specific support queues and escalation context.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed richer visibility and booking updates in the Cargo Digital Portal.
Deployed stronger shipment-state pathways in the Cargo Connectivity API.
